name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-47
title: sync-check.py first-run/drift path uses bare except — silently swallows generate failures
description: hooks/sync-check.py lines 64-71: subprocess.check_output on generate-claude-md.py is wrapped in 'except Exception: return 0'. If generate-claude-md.py fails (missing policy-header.json, syntax error in policy files, etc.), sync-check silently returns 0 and emits nothing. The user gets no signal that policy drift detection has been disabled. Suggest at least a stderr warning when generate fails so the failure mode is observable.

history.note: wave-4 cleanup; fixed in e10610a (impl) and 91f2c68 (tests)
